scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @pie-gemma4/server" "npm run dev -w @pie-gemma4/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @pie-gemma4/server && npm run build -w @pie-gemma4/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @pie-gemma4/server && npm run typecheck -w @pie-gemma4/web
